title: Tulangan Utara Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Tulangan Utara with a Z-Score of +3.17. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Tulangan Utara is at a critical level, with a Z-Score of +3.17 indicating a significant anomaly in temperature. 
 The city is experiencing high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 10.1 GG, and high humidity at 83%. 
 The wind speed is relatively low at 3.1 km/h, which may exacerbate the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
